    Bibliography Import MCMC Samples
  • Changelog

Function reference

Data input/output

is_original()
Check for an Original MCMC File
as_coda()
Coda
as_events() as_phases() as_rece()
Coerce
read_bcal()
Read BCal Output
read_chronomodel_events() read_chronomodel_phases() read_chronomodel_model()
Read ChronoModel Output
read_oxcal()
Read OxCal Output

Rhythms

activity() autoplot(<ActivityEvents>) plot(<ActivityEvents>,<missing>) multiplot(<ActivityEvents>)
Activity Plot
occurrence() autoplot(<OccurrenceEvents>) plot(<OccurrenceEvents>,<missing>)
Occurrence Plot
rece() autoplot(<RECE>) plot(<RECE>,<missing>)
Radiocarbon Event Count Ensemble
roc() autoplot(<RateOfChange>) plot(<RateOfChange>,<missing>)
Rate of Change
tempo() autoplot(<CumulativeEvents>) plot(<CumulativeEvents>,<missing>) multiplot(<CumulativeEvents>)
Tempo Plot

Phases

boundaries()
Phase Time Range
duration()
Phase Duration
phase()
Phases
transition()
Transition Range Between Successive Phases

Age-Depth Modeling

bury() predict(<AgeDepthModel>) autoplot(<AgeDepthModel>) plot(<AgeDepthModel>,<missing>)
Age-Depth Modeling
interpolate()
Interpolate Between Two Dates
proxy() autoplot(<ProxyRecord>) plot(<ProxyRecord>,<missing>) summary(<ProxyRecord>)
Layer-Counted Proxy Records Uncertainties

Visualization

multiplot() autoplot(<MCMC>) plot(<MCMC>,<missing>) autoplot(<PhasesMCMC>) plot(<PhasesMCMC>,<missing>)
Plot

Statistics

credible()
Bayesian Credible Interval
hpdi()
Bayesian HPD Regions
sensitivity()
Sensitivity
summary(<MCMC>) summary(<PhasesMCMC>)
Marginal Summary Statistics for Multiple MCMC Chains

Tests

apportion()
Apportioned Probabilities
hiatus()
Hiatus Between Two Dates
older()
Bayesian Test for Anteriority/Posteriority

Calendar

elapse() BP_to_CE() CE_to_BP() b2k_to_BP() b2k_to_CE() is_BP() is_CE() is_b2k()
Time Scales

Getters and Setters

cbind2(<MCMC>,<MCMC>)
Combine two MCMC Objects
get_calendar() get_hash() names(<MCMC>) `names<-`(<MCMC>) names(<PhasesMCMC>) `names<-`(<PhasesMCMC>)
Get or Set Parts of an Object
sort(<MCMC>)
Sort an MCMC Object
`[`(<MCMC>) `[`(<PhasesMCMC>) `[[`(<MCMC>,<numeric>,<missing>) `[[`(<PhasesMCMC>,<numeric>,<missing>) `[[`(<PhasesMCMC>,<character>,<missing>) `[<-`(<MCMC>) `[<-`(<PhasesMCMC>)
Extract or Replace Parts of an Object

Classes

ActivityEvents-class .ActivityEvents
Activity
AgeDepthModel-class .AgeDepthModel
Age-Depth Model
CumulativeEvents-class .CumulativeEvents
Cumulative Events
MCMC MCMC-class .MCMC EventsMCMC-class .EventsMCMC DurationsMCMC-class .DurationsMCMC
MCMC Events
OccurrenceEvents-class .OccurrenceEvents
Occurrence
PhasesMCMC-class .PhasesMCMC
MCMC Phases
ProxyRecord-class .ProxyRecord
Proxy Record
RECE-class .RECE
Radiocarbon Event Count Ensemble
RateOfChange-class .RateOfChange
Rate of Change
TimeRange-class .TimeRange
Cumulative Events

Datasets

events
Events
phases
Phases

On this page

chronos is a part of the tesselle project, a collection of packages for research and teaching in archaeology. Learn more at tesselle.org.

Developed by Anne Philippe, Marie-Anne Vibet, Nicolas Frerebeau.

Site built with pkgdown 2.0.6.
